name: Skeleton
purpose: Provides stable loading placeholders so screens can preserve structure before data arrives.
whenToUse: Use when the final component layout is known but content has not loaded yet.
Use circle skeletons for avatar placeholders and line skeletons for text.
whenNotToUse: Do not use skeletons when a short inline spinner or immediate optimistic update is clearer.
Do not leave long-running flows in a skeleton state without other status feedback.
accessibilityRequirements: Treat skeletons as decorative loading structure so they do not add noisy announcements.
Pair skeleton states with other context when loading lasts long enough to need explanation.
